phase_1_prd_design.notes: No PRD. Production bug fix. No UI changes.

phase_2_technical.notes: Inline research only. Verified three URI forms against Pydantic AnyUrl with UrlConstraints(host_required=False). Confirmed str() round-trip lossless for chosen form.
phase_2_technical.key_finding: ReadResourceRequestParams.uri in mcp/types.py uses AnyUrl — server-side validation fails for any client sending cendoj://ECLI:...

phase_3_scope.rationale: Single decorator argument change + test promotion. No new modules, no new dependencies, no DB, no auth.
